case_title: NEW HAMPSHIRE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MIAOZHEN LIN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO INJURED WORKER PAMELA WALKER, OF 3RD PARTY SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 3859 & 3860; PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW HAMPSHIRE INSURANCE COMPANY
